---
name: Skill Request
about: Suggest new product coverage or platform support for AI coding agents
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What should the skill teach agents to do?

Describe the Agora product, platform, or use case the skill would cover.

## Why is this needed?

What problems do agents currently have without this skill?
What mistakes do they make when working with this product?

## Agora product

Which Agora product does this cover? (RTC / RTM / ConvoAI / Cloud Recording / Server / Other)

## Scope

What specific guidance would this skill include?

Keep the freeze-forever test in mind: skills should encode behavioral patterns
that remain correct without updates. API parameter lists and request formats
belong behind MCP, not inline.
